---
title: "Ryan Horn"
about:
  template: jolla # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryanhorn15/
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/ryan_horn15/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rhorn15/rhorn15.github.io
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: Ryan Horn Resume.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rmh14@geneseo.edu

---

*Data Analytics student at SUNY Geneseo and Claims Analytics Intern with experience working across SQL, Power BI, enterprise datasets, and reporting workflows. I enjoy building practical data products, validating results, and translating analysis into clear insights for teams and decision-makers. My background in analytics, military service, and hands-on operations has strengthened my adaptability, initiative, collaboration, and communication skills.*

## Education

**SUNY Geneseo**  
Bachelor of Science in Data Analytics, expected May 2026  
Geneseo, NY  
Major GPA: 3.82

## Experience

**AF Group**  
*Claims Analytics Intern | May 2025 - Present*

- Built Power BI reports for workers' compensation claims using a Fabric semantic model to support operational decisions, trend analysis, and more reliable reporting.
- Performed data validation, user acceptance testing, and ad hoc analysis in Excel and SQL across internal reporting resources.
- Led demonstrations of new reporting tools for management and business partners and developed training material to support data literacy initiatives.

**U.S. Army National Guard**  
*Infantry Soldier | July 2020 - Present*

- Completed Combat Lifesaver Certification and Airborne School, strengthening technical discipline, safety awareness, and performance under pressure.
- Served in Eastern Africa in support of the Global War on Terror, contributing to base defense, threat assessment, and quick reaction force operations.

**Tambe Electric**  
*Low Voltage Electrician | September 2018 - August 2020*

- Installed and maintained low-voltage systems for communication, security, and audio-visual components.
- Applied wiring, configuration, and troubleshooting skills to deliver reliable low-voltage solutions.

## Projects

**Accenture North America Data Analytics and Visualization Simulation**  
- Cleaned, modeled, and analyzed seven datasets to identify content trends and support strategic recommendations.
- Built a PowerPoint presentation and video summary to communicate findings to stakeholders.

**PwC Switzerland Power BI Simulation**  
- Created Power BI dashboards focused on KPIs and executive reporting needs.
- Analyzed HR data to identify drivers behind gender-balance issues and proposed data-driven recommendations.

## Skills

**Analytics and Programming:** Python, R, SQL, Power BI, DAX, Excel, Power Query  
**Tools:** Microsoft 365, PowerPoint, Word, Jira  
**Professional Strengths:** Leadership, Communication, Collaboration, Adaptability, Problem Solving, Initiative
